case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. YUSUF A SHAKUUR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAKUUR, YUSUF A AN INDIVIDUAL $872.54 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $703.25 INTEREST, $225.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,071.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
